name: Poached Filets Mignons with Horseradish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Accompaniment: Butternut Squash, Turnip, and Green-Bean Quinoa (see recipe)
2. Season filets with salt and pepper.
3. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat demiglace and water just to a simmer and add the steak(s).
4. Add boiling water to the mixture if necessary to make enough liquid to just cover the steak(s). Poach the steak(s) at a bare simmer (meat will toughen if allowed to boil), without turning, for 8 minutes and remove from broth.
5. Boil the broth over high heat until reduced to about 1/2 cup and stir in mustard and horseradish.
6. Keep sauce warm over low heat and halve steaks horizontally.
7. Mound quinoa mixture on one side of four large plates and arrange two slices of steak alongside.
8. Spoon sauce over steak.
